summary: Do not ship: the new dev-env voice path has defensible lifecycle and timeout blockers.

findings.title: Microphone recording can outlive the chat pane
findings.recommendation: Store the MediaStream in a ref and add an unmount/voice-disable cleanup that stops any active MediaRecorder and all tracks, clears recorderRef, and resets recording state. This matters because dev-env can unmount ChatPane by switching back to Terminal or changing sessions while recording is active.

findings.title: Voice proxy TTS/STT calls can hang indefinitely
findings.recommendation: Wrap both upstream fetches in AbortSignal.timeout or an AbortController with a bounded timeout, return a 504/502 on abort, and ensure the client response is closed. The health probe has a timeout, but the actual TTS/STT proxy calls do not.
